class.name: AudioStreamPolyphonic
class.brief_description: Stores multiple sub-[AudioStream]s added via [AudioStreamPlaybackPolyphonic] and allows them to be played simultaneously using a single player.
class.description: [AudioStreamPolyphonic] lets the user play multiple audio streams simultaneously at any time from code, using a single player. Playback control is done via an [AudioStreamPlaybackPolyphonic] instance. After setting the [code]stream[/code] property of an audio stream player and playing it, the playback instance can be obtained by calling the [method AudioStreamPlayer.get_stream_playback], [method AudioStreamPlayer2D.get_stream_playback], or [method AudioStreamPlayer3D.get_stream_playback] methods.

members.member: Maximum number of simultaneous streams that can be played.
